item.name: Microsoft Azure Get The Health State Change Of A Monitor Of A Virtual Machine At The Provided Timestamp Optional Parameter: $expand Retrieve The Monitor S Evidence And Configuration

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for the operation.
Optionally expand the monitor’s evidence and/or configuration. Example: $expand=evidence,configuration.

variable.description: (Required) The subscription Id of the virtual machine.
(Required) The resource group of the virtual machine.
(Required) The provider name (ex: Microsoft.Compute for virtual machines).
(Required) The resource collection name (ex: virtualMachines for virtual machines).
(Required) The name of the virtual machine.
(Required) The monitor Id of the virtual machine.
(Required) The timestamp of the state change (unix format).

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The health monitor state change matching the specified criteria.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for the operation.
Optionally expand the monitor’s evidence and/or configuration. Example: $expand=evidence,configuration.

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for the operation.
Optionally expand the monitor’s evidence and/or configuration. Example: $expand=evidence,configuration.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get The Health State Changes Of A Monitor Of A Virtual Machine Within The Provided Time Window Default Is The Last 24 Hours  Optional Parameters: $expand Retrieve The Monitor S Evidence And Configuration And $filter Filter By Heartbeat Con

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for the operation.
Optionally filter by heartbeat condition. Example: $filter=isHeartbeat eq false.
Optionally expand the monitor’s evidence and/or configuration. Example: $expand=evidence,configuration.
The start of the time window.
The end of the time window.

variable.description: (Required) The subscription Id of the virtual machine.
(Required) The resource group of the virtual machine.
(Required) The provider name (ex: Microsoft.Compute for virtual machines).
(Required) The resource collection name (ex: virtualMachines for virtual machines).
(Required) The name of the virtual machine.
(Required) The monitor Id of the virtual machine.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The health monitor state changes matching the specified criteria.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for the operation.
Optionally filter by heartbeat condition. Example: $filter=isHeartbeat eq false.
Optionally expand the monitor’s evidence and/or configuration. Example: $expand=evidence,configuration.

The end of the time window.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get The Current Health Status Of All Monitors Of A Virtual Machine Optional Parameters: $expand Retrieve The Monitor S Evidence And Configuration And $filter Filter By Monitor Name

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for the operation.
Optionally filter by monitor name. Example: $filter=monitorName eq 'logical-disks|C:|disk-free-space-mb.'
Optionally expand the monitor’s evidence and/or configuration. Example: $expand=evidence,configuration.

variable.description: (Required) The subscription Id of the virtual machine.
(Required) The resource group of the virtual machine.
(Required) The provider name (ex: Microsoft.Compute for virtual machines).
(Required) The resource collection name (ex: virtualMachines for virtual machines).
(Required) The name of the virtual machine.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The health monitors matching the specified criteria.
